sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29717" key="dwdeka/klinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δωδεκά-κλῑνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29717.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">holdingtwelve</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλῖναι</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:41:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
